playbook.intent: End-of-sprint demo to client stakeholders (often non-technical) → explicit acceptance per AC, action items captured, senior dev runs it solo (not the PM).
playbook.scope: Atomic ceremony: end-of-sprint demo with the offshore senior leading. Output: per-AC explicit acceptance, captured action items, recording archived, narrative tailored to executive audience where present. Avoids 'great, send a recording' non-decisions.

success-criteria.criterion: AC checked off live with stakeholder confirmation
No 'send recording, we'll review later' close

stage.name: Prep narrative
stage.intent: Build the story arc before opening the IDE.
stage.decision-gate: Advance only when narrative answers the primary stakeholder's question.

stage.name: Script + dry-run
stage.intent: Make sure the demo runs the same in front of the client as in rehearsal.

tasks.task: Write demo script tied to AC
Verify environment + data look real, not synthetic
Prepare fallback for any flaky path

stage.decision-gate: Advance only after a clean dry-run.

stage.name: Run + collect acceptance
stage.intent: Drive the demo, surface acceptance per AC, capture actions.

tasks.task: Run demo; call out AC explicitly per ticket
Use requirements-validation prompts to lock acceptance
Capture action items with named owners + dates

stage.decision-gate: Done only when acceptance per AC is explicit. 'Looks good' without per-AC sign is incomplete.

extra.value: [Sprint retrospective — separate ceremony, Sales pitch — internal customer, Live development — the build is done]
[Sprint goal achieved (or partial known), AC list per ticket accessible, Stakeholders confirmed; AV checked]
[Showing features without tying them to the AC, Letting acceptance default to 'send the recording', Demo-driven development — building flashy things instead of valid ones]
['Did the primary stakeholder get an answer to their question?', 'Did I close every AC live?', 'Did I leave with named action owners and dates?']
{human: faion get-content client-demo-prep-and-run --format md, agent: faion get-content client-demo-prep-and-run --format context, json: faion get-content client-demo-prep-and-run --format json}
[{version: 0.1.0, date: 2026-05-20, note: 'Initial draft for F-064 P4 outsource-specialist persona, atomic angle'}]
